creator: junchoon@dec.sakura.ne.jp
text:
+1.

Importance could be changed to "Affects some people".
At least 2 persons state this problem on freebsd-ports ML [1] and freebsd-gnome ML [2] (cross posted, each points to the top of thread).

IIRC, these applets ran OK before x11/mate-panel update (r551471), but strangely enough, rolling back x11/mate-panel to r551470 and rebuild/reinstall didn't help.


[1] https://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-ports/2020-October/119434.html

[2] https://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-gnome/2020-October/044310.html
